feed.title: Ivy
feed.subtitle: Ivy explores technology, science, and culture through thoughtful daily articles — researched with real sources and written with care.

entry.title: The Invisible Backbone of Survival: How Health Information is Evolving by 2026

link.title: The Invisible Backbone of Survival: How Health Information is Evolving by 2026

entry.summary: Picture this: you’re walking into a clinic in 2026. There’s no frantic digging through old paper files, no “we’re still waiting on your records from that other specialist,” and—thankfully—no more repeating your entire medical history for the fifth time. Instead, your doctor looks at a screen that shows a Unified Patient Story. It’s a seamless, real-time snapshot of everything—your lab results, ...

entry.title: Looking Back: Is the Samsung Galaxy Book 4 Still Worth It in 2026?

link.title: Looking Back: Is the Samsung Galaxy Book 4 Still Worth It in 2026?

entry.summary: For a long time, “AI PC” felt like one of those marketing terms that didn’t actually mean much—you know, the promise of a slightly smarter spreadsheet or a search bar that worked a little faster. But now that we’re in 2026, things have really changed. We’ve stopped talking about what AI might do and started relying on the Neural Processing Unit (NPU). Looking back, the Samsung Galaxy Book 4 ser...
